name: UBA : Browsed to Uncategorized Website
notes:
A user has accessed a URL which may indicate elevated security or legal risk.

References:
   http://sitereview.bluecoat.com/categories.jsp
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%uncategorized%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%placeholder%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%insufficient%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%not-resolved%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%unknown%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%unclassified%' or "Web Category" in (64, 180) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Browsed to Uncategorized Website on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : URL Category Filter

AND when the event matches "Web Category" ilike '%uncategorized%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%placeholder%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%insufficient%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%not-resolved%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%unknown%' OR "Web Category" ilike '%unclassified%' or "Web Category" in (64, 180) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Browsed to Uncategorized Website
